scripts.e2e: docker compose --profile e2e up --build -d --wait && npm exec -w e2e playwright test
scripts.e2e:ui: docker compose --profile e2e up --build -d --wait && npm exec -w e2e playwright test --ui
scripts.e2e:local:prepare: npm run build -w @calendar/date-utils && npm run build -w api && npm run build -w web
scripts.e2e:local:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.override.local.yml --profile e2e up --build -d --wait
scripts.e2e:local:watch: sh -c 'npm run dev -w @calendar/date-utils & npm run build:watch -w api & npm run build:watch -w web & wait'
scripts.e2e:local: npm run e2e:local:prepare && npm run e2e:local:up && npm exec -w e2e playwright test
scripts.e2e:local:ui: npm run e2e:local:prepare && npm run e2e:local:up && npm exec -w e2e playwright test --ui
scripts.e2e:local:debug: sh -c 'set -e; npm run e2e:local:prepare; npm run e2e:local:up; npm run e2e:local:watch & WATCH_PID=$!; trap "kill $WATCH_PID" EXIT; npm exec -w e2e playwright test --ui'
scripts.e2e:local:down: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.override.local.yml --profile e2e down -v
